name: EthicaVoice
description: Voice Training Module — record samples, manage voice profiles, select active voice. Uses pyttsx3 now, Coqui TTS on M5. Profiles persist across migration.
author: Victory

tools.name: voice_list
tools.description: List available voices — system voices and custom profiles.

tools.name: voice_select
tools.description: Set active voice by profile name or system voice name.

tools.name: voice_record
tools.description: Record a 5-second voice sample for a custom profile. Microphone required.

tools.name: voice_status
tools.description: Show current voice configuration and M5 migration note.
